audit.note: press/close/accept/reject all toast roundtrip-free via control_global MESSAGE_TOAST.show - press/close compose a template (`Item Pressed: {0}`/`Closed: {0}` + ${$source>/title}), so the app is init-only (the client-side removeItem on close is still not mirrored, see below)

deviations.what: static notifications: onItemClose's client-side removeItem is not mirrored (toast only); group 3's onAcceptErrors is simplified to the accept toast.
the original's showCloseButton="falseue" typo on two items is corrected to false, otherwise UI5 boolean parsing rejects it.
